blended.narrative: Camp Fortune is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

Wednesday: 7" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
